changes.description: Initial release of the orders creation endpoint.
Initial release of the order retrieval endpoint.

Idempotency-Key header is now required on POST /orders. Send a fresh UUID per new operation and reuse it on retries. The server records the key and replays the original response on subsequent calls, setting Idempotent-Replay: true.

All error responses now conform to the five-field structured envelope: error_code, type, message, field (nullable), hint (nullable), retryable, retry_after_ms (nullable). Previously errors returned framework-default shapes.
